zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey De Stawell於1320年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Geoffrey De Stawell50歲，母親Jane de Colombières52歲。他和Juliana Gastelin至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1361年12月13日在英國薩默塞特斯塔維爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey De Stawell于1320年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Geoffrey De Stawell50岁，母亲Jane de Colombières52岁。他和Juliana Gastelin至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1361年12月13日在英国薩默塞特斯塔維爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stawell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stowell
meanings: English: habitational name from Stowell (Somerset), Stowell (Gloucestershire), East and West Stowell in Wilcot (Wiltshire), or Stawell (Somerset), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’. The surname was taken to the Isle of Man by 1511, from whence it migrated to Lancashire and Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey De Stawell was born in 1320, in Somerset, England, his father, Geoffrey De Stawell, was 50 and his mother, Jane de Colombières, was 52. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Juliana Gastelin. He died on 13 December 1361, in Stawell, Somerset, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey De Stawell est né en 1320, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey De Stawell, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Jane de Colombières, avait 52 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Juliana Gastelin. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1361, à Stawell, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey De Stawell 1320 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey De Stawell 50 und seine Mutter Jane de Colombières 52. Er hatte mit Juliana Gastelin mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1361 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Stawell, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey De Stawell è nato il nel 1320 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey De Stawell, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Jane de Colombières, aveva 52 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Juliana Gastelin. Morì il 13 dicembre 1361, nel Stawell, Somerset, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey De Stawellが1320年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Geoffrey De Stawellは50歳，母Jane de Colombièresは52歳であった。彼はJuliana Gastelinとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1361年12月13日にイギリスソメルセトスタウエルで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey De Stawell(이)가 1320년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey De Stawell(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Colombières(은)는 52세였다. 그는 Juliana Gastelin(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 12월 13일 영국 서머세트 스타웰에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey De Stawell nasceu em 1320, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey De Stawell, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Colombières, tinha 52 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Juliana Gastelin. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1361, em Stawell, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey De Stawell родился в 1320 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey De Stawell было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Colombières, 52. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Juliana Gastelin. Он умер 13 декабря 1361 г. в местности ставелл, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey De Stawell nació en 1320, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey De Stawell, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Jane de Colombières, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Juliana Gastelin. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1361, en Stawell, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
